testcase.classname: Validating the Adactin Login Web Application
testcase.name: Validating the login page with valid creaditials
testcase.system-out: Given user on the login page................................................passed When user enter the valid username and valid password.......................passed And user click the login....................................................passed Then user verify the search hotel page displayed............................passed

testcase.classname: Validating the Adactin Login Web Application
testcase.name: Validating the login page with invalid creaditials
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Verify Error Message at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89) at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42) at com.stepdefination.StepDefination.userVerifyTheErrorMessageDisplayedOrNot(StepDefination.java:59) at ✽.user verify the error message displayed or not(file:///C:/Users/Lenovo/eclipse-Tamizh13/Cucumber8PMBatch/src/test/resources/Features/AdactinLoginPage.feature:14)
testcase.system-out: Given user on the login page................................................passed When user enter the valid username and invalid password.....................passed And user click the login....................................................passed Then user verify the error message displayed or not.........................failed

testcase.classname: Validating the Adactin Login Web Application
testcase.name: Validation of search Hotel madatory fields
testcase.system-out: Given user on the login page................................................passed When user enter the valid username and valid password.......................passed And user click the login....................................................passed Then user verify the search hotel page displayed............................passed When user enter location and noOfRooms and checkInDate and checkOutDate and adultsperRoom and click the search button.passed
